title: cynoglossum × austriacum
intro: Cynoglossum × austriacum, also known as Austrian hound's tongue, is a hybrid plant species of the genus Cynoglossum. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Cynoglossum × austriacum include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
